calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Aug-27-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kristina L. Hillman, Esq., Weinberg, Roger & Rosenfeld, 510-839-6600, for petitoner/moving party Carpenters 46 Northern California Counties.
*Petitioner's counsel appeared. No other appearances and no opposition filed, the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PETITIONER CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. Order signed in open court. CSR Beldon Yee, #2647 (REQ/302/JU)
